scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, verified against the live Management API v2 reference (auth0.com/docs/api/management/v2/*) and the auth0/docs GitHub repo's v1-to-v2 endpoint map. Adds 2 fan-out membership streams (role_users, organization_members — every real per-role/per-organization list endpoint the tenant-scoped data surface exposes) and 8 write actions (create/update for users, clients, roles, and organizations — every practical POST/PATCH create-or-update mutation this dialect can express). The remaining Management API is broad (60+ resource families covering tenant-wide admin/security/branding/observability concerns, not tenant DATA); each excluded family below carries its own real, specific reason rather than one blanket bucket.

excluded.reason: single-user detail; identical record shape to the users list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
permanently deletes a user account; not a safe autonomous mutation
bulk-deletes every user in a connection; not a safe autonomous mutation

per-user role-membership list, the inverse of the already-covered role_users fan-out (roles -> their users); a second, redundant fan-out direction over the same user-role edge is Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
per-user organization-membership list, the inverse of the already-covered organization_members fan-out; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

per-user effective-permissions list; would need a 2-level-deep fan-out (users -> permissions, chained on top of the existing single-level fan_out), which this dialect does not support; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
per-user authentication-event log; part of the broader Logs family excluded below
account-linking mutation (links a second identity into an existing user), not a create-or-update of a syncable resource
unlinks a linked identity from a user; not a safe autonomous mutation
removes a user's enrolled MFA factor; security-sensitive, not a safe autonomous mutation
single-client detail; identical record shape to the clients list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
deletes an application registration, invalidating every credential issued to it; not a safe autonomous mutation
invalidates the client's existing secret, a live-credential-breaking security action; not a safe autonomous mutation
authorization-grant configuration linking clients to resource servers/scopes; a distinct tenant-security-config resource family, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-connection detail; identical record shape to the connections list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

connection configuration (options/strategy-specific credentials) is a broad polymorphic per-strategy schema this dialect's flat record_schema cannot faithfully express without silently dropping strategy-specific fields; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
deletes an identity connection, disconnecting every user provisioned through it; not a safe autonomous mutation
a live up/down health probe for an enterprise connection, not a syncable data record
deletes a single user by email from a database connection; not a safe autonomous mutation
single-role detail; identical record shape to the roles list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
deletes an RBAC role and its assignments; not a safe autonomous mutation
assigns existing users to a role by user_id list, a many-to-many membership-edge write rather than a create-or-update of a role/user record itself; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
per-role permission-grant list; a second, distinct fan-out family (roles -> permissions, not roles -> users) Pass B triaged out for breadth-vs-cost
single-organization detail; identical record shape to the organizations list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
deletes an organization and its memberships; not a safe autonomous mutation
adds existing users to an organization by user_id list, a many-to-many membership-edge write rather than a create-or-update of an organization/user record itself; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
removes members from an organization; not a safe autonomous mutation

per-member role list scoped to one organization; would need a 2-level-deep fan-out (organizations -> members -> roles) this dialect's single-level fan_out cannot express; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
pending-invitation list, a distinct lifecycle-state resource from organization membership itself; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
per-organization connection-enablement config, a distinct tenant-config resource; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

M2M client-credentials token exchange, driven by base.auth's oauth2_client_credentials candidate; not a syncable stream in its own right, exercised implicitly whenever client_id/client_secret auth is used
tenant-wide authentication/administration event log; a distinct time-series-log resource family, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-log-event detail; same excluded family as the logs list
Auth0 Rules are a deprecated extensibility mechanism, superseded by Actions; new tenants cannot create Rules
custom-code extensibility functions (arbitrary Node.js snippets bound to auth-flow trigger points), a code-deployment resource rather than tenant data; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
Auth0 Hooks (Webtask-based extensibility) are deprecated in favor of Actions
API/audience registration config (scopes, signing algorithm); tenant-security-config resource family, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
configuration variables for the deprecated Rules extensibility mechanism
per-device refresh-token/public-key credential list; a security-credential resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
tenant email-template content (a per-named-template singleton, not a list), Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
tenant email-delivery provider configuration singleton, not a syncable object list
MFA factor enablement config, a tenant-security-config resource; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
async job-status polling resource (bulk import/export progress), not a syncable data record
tenant signing-key material; requires the highly-privileged read:signing_keys scope, not assumed granted for a general-purpose data sync
custom-domain provisioning config, a tenant-infrastructure resource; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
single-IP block-status lookup, not a syncable object list
a single aggregate count, not a syncable object list
tenant-wide daily usage time series; an analytics/metrics resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
tenant branding-config singleton (colors/logo), not a syncable object list
tenant universal-login prompt-rendering config singleton, not a syncable object list
Auth0 Forms/Flows custom-flow definitions, a code/config-deployment resource; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
SSO self-service-onboarding profile config, a tenant-config resource; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
log-export destination configuration, a tenant-infrastructure resource; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
tenant attack-protection config singleton, not a syncable object list
per-user brute-force block-status lookup, not a syncable object list
revoked-JWT denylist entries, a security-state resource rather than tenant data; Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
issues a one-time password-change ticket URL; a transactional action, not a create-or-update of a data record
issues a one-time email-verification ticket URL; a transactional action, not a create-or-update of a data record
tenant-wide settings mutation, not a syncable read or a safe autonomous mutation
tenant-wide settings singleton, not a syncable object list
